title.rendered: The Rise of Lean Marketing Teams

content.rendered: In this episode of “Marketing in the Now,” Nowspeed CEO David Reske speaks with Andy Zimmerman, CMO of Tamr and a veteran marketing and tech leader, about the evolving landscape of marketing teams. Andy discusses the strategic imperative of running lean marketing teams, emphasizing the shift towards leveraging contractors, agencies, and AI to deliver more with fewer full-time staff. The conversation highlights how versatility is now prioritized over seniority in hiring, as marketers must be able to navigate diverse tools and functions, amplified by AI as a powerful accelerant. While acknowledging challenges like burnout, Andy offers strategic advice for CMOs on assessing talent, filling gaps wisely, and optimizing tech stacks for efficiency and impact.
